title: hierochloe magellanica
intro: Hierochloe magellanica, also known as sweet grass, is a perennial grass-like plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. This plant is valued for its sweet, vanilla-like fragrance and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sweet grass include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, sweet grass is commonly used in teas, infusions, and essential oils, and can also be smoked or used in potpourri blends for its fragrant properties.
